data.title: ATIS acquires Bayline Lift Technologies, expanding elevator inspection services in the Mid-Atlantic region. Strong growth expected.
data.description: St. Louis-based private equity firm Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP) revealed the purchase of Bayline Lift Technologies (Bayline) by ATIS, a TSCP portfolio company specializing in elevator and escalator safety inspections, consulting, and managed services in North America. Bayline offers elevator inspection services in the Mid-Atlantic region. The acquisition is expected to propel Bayline's growth, leveraging ATIS' expertise and support.

data.title: Brightstar Lottery (BRSL) partners with Totalizator Sportowy to offer instant ticket games in Poland.
data.description: Today, December 23, 2025, in London, Brightstar Lottery PLC (BRSL) disclosed its plans to introduce thrilling instant ticket games to players in Poland through a fresh agreement with Totalizator Sportowy, the national lottery in Poland. This collaboration is set to bring a new gaming experience to Polish players and enhance the country's lottery market. Brightstar's agreement with Totalizator Sportowy aims to offer a wide range of games and create opportunities for increased engagement among lottery enthusiasts in Poland.

data.title: Lindsay Corporation to announce Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Jan 8, 2026, with Randy Wood and Sam Hinrichsen hosting - (285 char)
data.description: Lindsay Corporation (NYSE: LNN), a prominent company specializing in irrigation and infrastructure equipment, is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, concluding on November 30, 2025. The report is scheduled to be unveiled on January 8, 2026, before the market opens. Key figures such as Randy Wood, the President and Chief Executive Officer, and Sam Hinrichsen, the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will be conducting a conference.

data.description: There is a price prediction for WLD indicating a possible recovery towards the range of $0.52 to $0.58 in the next 2-3 weeks. However, bearish trends suggest a potential testing of the $0.46 support level before any significant upward movement.

data.title: Forecasting $0.42-$0.46 for OP by Jan 2026, indicating 55-70% upside if $0.37 barrier is surpassed, despite short-term bearish trend.
data.description: The price prediction for OP suggests a possible increase of 55-70%, reaching a range of $0.42-$0.46 if the key resistance at $0.37 is surpassed. This optimistic outlook is offset by the prevailing bearish trend, indicating short-term risks for investors.

data.title: SUI price set to rebound to $1.70-$2.10 in 4-6 weeks, up 18-46% from current $1.44. Bullish MACD signals recovery.
data.description: The price forecast for SUI indicates a potential increase of 18-46%, reaching a range between $1.70 and $2.10. This positive outlook is supported by bullish MACD divergence and oversold conditions, signaling a potential recovery from the current level of $1.44.

data.title: Gray Media renews NBC affiliation in 54 markets, reaching 14M households (11% of US TV households), includes Nashville, Memphis, Richmond.
data.description: In Atlanta on December 23, 2025, Gray Media, Inc. and NBC disclosed a multi-year agreement to extend and renew station affiliation contracts in all 54 markets across the nation where Gray manages NBC affiliated TV stations. This deal impacts over 14 million households, which accounts for approximately 11% of U.S. TV households. The agreement includes key cities like Nashville, TN; Louisville, KY; Memphis, TN; Richmond, VA, and others.

data.title: Price forecast for ARB: Expected $0.24 breakout in 2 weeks, despite 2.26% dip. Early signals suggest 26% surge ahead.
data.description: According to ARB price predictions, there is a possibility of a 26% increase to reach the $0.24 resistance level. This is despite a recent minor decline of 2.26%. Analyses indicate early signs of bullish momentum in the technical aspects of the market.

data.title: Global refrigeration equipment market estimated revenue of $67.06 billion in 2024, with 8.7% CAGR by 2030. Report highlights trends in sustainable technologies, natural refrigerants, AI, and IoT.
data.description: A new report titled "Refrigeration Equipment Market, Global, 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The report forecasts that the revenue for the base year 2024 is estimated to be $67.06 billion, and it predicts a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.7% for the period of 2024-2030. The report delves into the transformations influencing the worldwide refrigeration market, examining the factors that propel and hinder growth in this sector. Moreover, it highlights the growth prospects that arise from these changes for market participants and stakeholders alike.

data.title: Global animation market to reach $953.31 billion by 2035 with USD 462.32 billion in 2025, growing at 7.52% CAGR. North America leads with 33.97% market share in 2025, driven by 3D animation and media & entertainment. Streaming platforms, technology advancements, and increased demand for animated content fuel market growth across industries.
data.description: The global animation market is valued at USD 462.32 billion in 2025 and is expected to reach USD 953.31 billion by 2035, with a solid CAGR of 7.52% from 2025 to 2034. North America captured 33.97% of the market share in 2025, with the 3D animation segment leading at 44.16%. Media and entertainment was the largest industry segment at 29.75% revenue share. The manufacturing sector is projected to have the fastest CAGR from 2026 to 2035. The market is driven by streaming platforms, technological advancements, and increased demand for animated content. Various types of animations like 2D, 3D, stop-motion, and motion graphics are extensively used in industries like entertainment, education, advertising, and gaming. Private investments in animation studios are increasing, with streaming platforms like Netflix and Amazon heavily investing in original animated content. The rise of streaming platforms has led to the increased demand for adult animated content and virtual production techniques. The expansion of e-learning is surging the demand for animation in creating visual and interactive content. Overall, the animation market growth is attributed to technological advancements, media expansion, digital platforms, and the rising demand for high-quality animated content.

data.title: Dimension Hospitality wins Guest Service Provider of the Year for 2025 due to culture, service, and innovation excellence.
data.description: Dimension Hospitality has been acknowledged by Hospitality Business Review for their exceptional culture, service, and innovation. Based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., on Dec. 23, 2025, the company received recognition for their dedication to these key areas. This award highlights their commitment to excellence in hospitality, showcasing the impact of their efforts on the industry. Dimension Hospitality's achievements in these aspects are lauded by industry experts, further solidifying their position as a leader in the field.
